scope_note: QA Gnomonic RT Cert family [164]: certifies gnomonic map projection via rational trigonometry (spreads/crosses). Gnomonic quadrance Q = spread_c / cross_c where spread_c = 1 - cos²(angular_distance). Great circles project to straight lines (collinearity via spread). Berggren tree moves on C²+F²=G² cone = discrete geodesic steps that project to straight-line segments. Three Berggren generators M_A, M_B, M_C produce Pythagorean triples. Theorem NT compliant: continuous lat/lon → QA direction (d,e) → gnomonic chart. Tier 1 exact reformulation + Tier 2 structural (Berggren connection).
